message:
refactor: replace stringly-typed payloads with proper typed structures

Three related changes replacing loosely-typed representations with
structured types for better type safety and correctness:

1. messaging/control.rs — ControlAdvisory::to_json_payload() now
   emits properly-typed serde_json::Value instead of a flat
   BTreeMap<String, String>.  Booleans (has_decision_provenance)
   and numbers (ts_unix_ms) are their native JSON types instead of
   string coercions.  Previously-dropped fields (obligation_subject,
   affected_subjects array) are restored.  Tests updated to assert
   typed values.

2. tests/fabric_e2e.rs — Replaces five raw bool fields on
   CertifiedRequestOutcome with a typed CertifiedRequestChecks
   struct using ValidationStatus, PresenceStatus, and LedgerStatus
   enums serializable to JSON.  Eliminates redundant endpoint.clone()
   calls.  Adds clippy::too_many_lines suppressions on five large
   test functions.

3. packages/browser-core/index.d.ts — Introduces discriminated
   HandleRef subtypes (RuntimeHandleRef, RegionHandleRef,
   TaskHandleRef, etc.) and per-handle-kind union aliases, replacing
   the loose HandleRef union on all request interfaces and class
   constructors.  Makes it impossible to pass wrong handle types.

4. tests/wasm_js_exports_coverage_contract.rs — New contract test
   pinning the discriminated handle types in the TypeScript
   declarations to prevent regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -860,6 +860,37 @@ fn browser_core_types_declare_webtransport_requests_and_exports() {
     }
 }
 
+#[test]
+fn browser_core_types_pin_truthful_handle_kind_aliases_for_request_surfaces() {
+    let content = read_source("packages/browser-core/index.d.ts");
+    for marker in [
+        "export type RuntimeHandleRef = HandleRef & { kind: \"runtime\" };",
+        "export type RegionHandleRef = HandleRef & { kind: \"region\" };",
+        "export type TaskHandleRef = HandleRef & { kind: \"task\" };",
+        "export type CancellationTokenHandleRef = HandleRef & { kind: \"cancel_token\" };",
+        "export type FetchHandleRef = HandleRef & { kind: \"fetch_request\" };",
+        "export type RuntimeHandleLike = RuntimeHandle | RuntimeHandleRef;",
+        "export type RegionHandleLike = RegionHandle | RegionHandleRef;",
+        "export type TaskHandleLike = TaskHandle | TaskHandleRef;",
+        "parent: RuntimeHandleLike | RegionHandleLike;",
+        "scope: RegionHandleLike;",
+        "task: TaskHandleLike;",
+        "socket: TaskHandleLike;",
+        "session: TaskHandleLike;",
+        "constructor(rawHandle: RuntimeHandleRef);",
+        "constructor(rawHandle: RegionHandleRef);",
+        "constructor(rawHandle: TaskHandleRef);",
+        "runtimeHandle: RuntimeHandleLike,",
+        "regionHandle: RegionHandleLike,",
+        "taskHandle: TaskHandleLike,",
+    ] {
+        assert!(
+            content.contains(marker),
+            "browser-core types must preserve truthful handle-kind marker: {marker}"
+        );
+    }
+}
+
 #[test]
 fn react_src_index_exports_from_browser() {
     let path = repo_root().join("packages/react/src/index.ts");
